visual_description: Two men stand facing each other in an indoor setting; one wears a pink plaid shirt and the other a blue plaid shirt over a white tee. The man in the blue shirt has his arms crossed and looks toward the other man, while the man in the pink shirt turns slightly away. Behind them, a wooden door with a visible number and framed artwork on the wall are visible.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and loudness, speaking at a moderate pace with a neutral tone.
